options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: energy_link
options.description:
EnergyLink allows players to deposit energy extracted from collected bananas into a shared pool across games in the session.

You can exchange energy for Instant DK Barrels. Great for players that find the base game hard.
There's an additional item in the item pool that allows for better energy extraction from bananas.

options.name: trap_link
options.description: Whether your received traps are linked to other players

options.name: starting_life_count
options.description: How many lives to start the game with.

options.name: gangplank_tokens
options.description: How many Big Bananas are required to unlock Gang-Plank Galleon

options.name: required_jungle_levels
options.description: How many levels in Kongo Jungle need to be cleared to fight Very Gnawty

options.name: required_mines_levels
options.description: How many levels in Monkey Mines need to be cleared to fight Master Necky

options.name: required_valley_levels
options.description: How many levels in Vine Valley need to be cleared to fight Queen B.

options.name: required_glacier_levels
options.description: How many levels in Gorilla Glacier need to be cleared to fight Really Gnawty

options.name: required_industries_levels
options.description: How many levels in Kremkroc Industries Inc. need to be cleared to fight Dumb Drum

options.name: required_caverns_levels
options.description: How many levels in Chimp Caverns need to be cleared to fight Master Necky Snr.

options.name: kong_checks
options.description: Whether collecting all KONG letters in each level will grant a check

options.name: balloon_checks
options.description:
Whether collecting balloons in levels will grant a check

Doesn't include balloons inside bonuses

options.name: banana_checks
options.description:
Whether collecting banana bunches in levels will grant a check

Doesn't include banana bunches inside bonuses

options.name: token_checks
options.description:
Whether collecting an animal token in levels will grant a check

Doesn't include tokens inside bonuses

options.name: starting_kong
options.description: Which Kongs will be available at the start

options.name: starting_world
options.description: Which world you will start in

options.name: shuffle_abilities
options.description:
Which abilities will be added as items in the item pool
If an ability is not present in the list they will be treated as unlocked from the start

options.name: shuffle_animals
options.description:
Which animal buddies will be added as items in the item pool
If an animal buddy is not present in the list they will be treated as unlocked from the start

options.name: shuffle_objects
options.description:
Which kind of objects will be added as items in the item pool
If an object is not present in the list they will be treated as unlocked from the start

options.name: trap_fill_percentage
options.description: Replace a percentage of junk items in the item pool with random traps

options.name: jump_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of a receiving a trap which makes the player jump uncontrollably

options.name: sticky_floor_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of a receiving a trap which makes the player unable to walk or roll in the ground

options.name: stun_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of a receiving a trap which freezes the player in place for a few seconds

options.name: ice_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of a receiving a trap which makes the floor slippery

options.name: nut_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of a receiving a trap which spawns a nut on top of the player

options.name: army_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of a receiving a trap which spawns an Army on top of the player

options.name: animal_bonus_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of a receiving a trap which sends the player to an Animal Bonus level

options.name: player_palettes
options.description:
Allows you to create colors for each Kong status. Includes K.Rool effects and the invincibility barrel
This will override the option preset

Each one expects 15 values which are mapped to the Kongs colors
The values can be in SNES RGB (bgr555) with the $ prefix or PC RGB (rgb888) with the # prefix

options.name: player_palette_filters
options.description:
Applies a filter that can brighten or darken your selected palette
Doesn't produce results similar to the original ones, but it's good enough

Positive numbers create a brighter color palette (the higher the number, the brighter the palette)
Negative numbers create a darker color palette (the higher (or lower lol) the negative number, the darker the palette)

Treat the values as percentages

options.name: palette_donkey_active
options.description: Which color to use for Donkey's active color

options.name: palette_donkey_inactive
options.description: Which color to use for Donkey's inactive color

options.name: palette_diddy_active
options.description: Which color to use for Diddy's active color

options.name: palette_diddy_inactive
options.description: Which color to use for Diddy's inactive color

options.name: kong_letters
options.description:
Which word will be displayed by the KONG letters.
Limited to 4 characters from A to Z.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.

options.name: start_inventory_from_pool
options.description:
Start with the specified amount of these items and don't place them in the world. Example: "Bomb: 1"

The game decides what the replacement items will be.
